muniCodeNote: ecode360 returns HTTP 403 for direct WebFetch. weho.org also WAF-blocked. Use WebSearch or city contact for code lookups.
fireAgencyNote: LACoFD (NOT LAFD). Stations 7 and 8 serve WeHo. Fire plan check approval required before Building Permit issuance for applicable projects.
wuiNote: FHSZ adopted via WHMC §14.04.060 (Sept 15, 2025) following Cal Fire March 2025 map update. Flat urban city — Very High FHSZ unlikely; some Moderate/High areas possible. Interactive FHSZ lookup: engage.weho.org/firemaps.
codeHierarchy: 2025 CBC (base) → LA County Titles 26/27/28 (amendments) → WHMC (controls on conflict)
operativeCode: 2025 California Building Standards Code (Title 24), effective January 1, 2026
aduProgram: Pre-Approved ADU Plan Program; governed by WHMC Chapter 19.43; 60-day ministerial approval
solarFeeWaiverNote: Building, electrical, and plumbing plan check/permit fees waived for qualifying residential rooftop solar. Zone clearance fee and state/outside agency fees still apply.
